prerequisite_reason: Enterprise-Grade certifiable score 3.8 < 8.5 required for Bank-Grade. Internal readiness is strong but external blockers (SOC 2, pen-test) prevent certification. B-GAP assessed for readiness only.

external_dependencies.blocker: SOC 2 Type I not complete; Type II observation period not started
Red team scope and playbook exist but no exercise executed
No SARB engagement or FSCA license
DR tests executed but no external witness

controls.name: SOC 2 Type II
controls.evidence: Type I not yet complete. Readiness checklist at ~92% and evidence inventory exists, but no auditor engaged. Type II observation period cannot start until Type I complete.
controls.raw_output: docs/compliance/soc2-readiness-checklist.md: ~92% mapped; no auditor engaged; no Type II observation period doc

controls.name: PCI DSS Level 1
controls.evidence: No raw card data (PAN, CVV) found in codebase. Tokenization architecture documented. No card handling = PCI DSS N/A with full points.
controls.raw_output: grep -ri card/pan/cvv tools/*/src/: no results; docs/security/tokenization-architecture.md exists

controls.name: Red team exercise (annual)
controls.evidence: Red team scope and rules of engagement published (assumed-breach model, success criteria, timeline, vendor selection). Red team playbook and containment narrative template exist. Exercise not yet executed; planned for 2026-H2.

controls.name: Dedicated CISO or vCISO
controls.evidence: CISO role definition published (authority, responsibilities, accountability, delegation). Board Security Committee Charter defines CISO as standing member. Named CISO not yet appointed; target 2026-06-30. Monthly board reporting not yet evidenced.

controls.raw_output: docs/compliance/board-security-committee-charter.md: CISO standing member, primary reporting officer

controls.name: Regulatory relationship (SARB, FSCA)
controls.evidence: Regulatory contacts and relationship map published; SARB, FSCA, FIC, Information Regulator contacts documented. No active SARB engagement filed; no FSCA license application submitted; FIC registration as Accountable Institution not started.
controls.raw_output: find docs/compliance/: no sarb-engagement.md; docs/compliance/regulatory-framework.md exists

controls.name: Fraud detection + AML monitoring
controls.evidence: AML monitoring policy published (risk-based approach, transaction monitoring rules AML-001–AML-005, sanctions screening lists, STR/SAR filing process, record keeping, training). Sanctions screening APIs not yet integrated; goAML portal access pending FIC registration.

controls.raw_output: docs/compliance/data-retention-policy.md: KYC 5-7 years for AML; no aml-monitoring.md; no sanctions screening config

controls.name: Segregation of duties (SoD)
controls.evidence: SoD matrix exists (docs/compliance/separation-of-duties-matrix.md). Approval workflows referenced in tools. IAM roles separated between terraform and runtime.

controls.name: BCP tested annually with evidence
controls.evidence: Two DR drills executed (2026-05-12 and 2026-05-17) with evidence templates. RTO/RPO documented. No external witness signature.

controls.name: Customer fund segregation
controls.evidence: Trust account framework published (account architecture, daily reconciliation, segregation of duties, disbursement policies, CPA audit trail, breach response). Trust accounts not yet opened — pending bank partnership (target 2026-Q4).

controls.name: Pen-test every 6 months
controls.evidence: No pen-test reports in 12 months. First engagement planned for 2026-06-30 completion. Remediation evidence pipeline exists.
controls.raw_output: docs/audit/pen-test-scope-2026.md: target completion 2026-06-30; find docs/audit/: no pen-test reports

recommendations: Complete SOC 2 Type I before initiating Type II observation period.
Engage SARB and begin FSCA Category I/II license application.
